gates.name: Gate A — North Main
gates.notes: Busiest 60–30 min before kickoff. Closest to Sections 101–108.

gates.name: Gate B — North East
gates.notes: Wheelchair-accessible with ramps and elevators. Closest to Sections 109–116. Accessible drop-off zone nearby.

gates.name: Gate C — East
gates.location: East side, near Parking Lot P1
gates.notes: Typically one of the fastest entry gates. Closest to Sections 117–122.

gates.name: Gate D — South Main
gates.notes: Busiest 60–30 min before kickoff. Closest to Sections 123–130.

gates.name: Gate E — South West
gates.notes: Wheelchair-accessible with ramps and elevators. Closest to Sections 131–136. Accessible parking in Lot P3.

gates.name: Gate F — West
gates.notes: Typically one of the fastest entry gates. Closest to Sections 137–140 and 101–104.

foodCourts.name: North Bites
foodCourts.hours: Gates open until end of match

foodCourts.name: East Eats
foodCourts.hours: Gates open until end of match

foodCourts.name: Sky Dining
foodCourts.hours: Gates open until 60 min after match

medicalStations.name: Medical Station 1
medicalStations.location: Level 1, between Gate A and Gate B

lostAndFound.location: Main Concourse, Level 1, near Gate A
lostAndFound.hours: Opens with gates, closes 90 min after match

taxiRideshare.location: West side, 2-minute walk from Gate F

crowdGuidance.busiestGates: Gates A and D are busiest 60–30 minutes before kickoff.
crowdGuidance.fastestGates: Gates C and F are typically the fastest for entry.
crowdGuidance.tip: Arrive at least 90 minutes before kickoff for the smoothest entry experience.
